title: Towards Free Normalization: Fusing Normalization into GEMM and Attention Kernels
raw_text: Code available at: https://github.com/facebookresearch/ads_model_kernel_library/tree/main/multi_cta_norm_fusion and https://github.com/facebookresearch/ads_model_kernel_library/tree/main/gdpa_megakernel TL;DR In this blog post, we present various novel kernel fusion techniques for common normalization ops like LayerNorm and RMSNorm, which provide significant speedup...
reason_zh: 提出将LayerNorm等归一化操作融合进GEMM和Attention核的新方法，显著加速推理，对工程优化有直接价值。
summary_zh: Meta发布博客介绍多种新颖的核融合技术，将LayerNorm、RMSNorm等常见归一化操作融合进GEMM和Attention内核中。通过消除额外的内存读写和内核启动开销，实现了显著的加速效果。代码已开源在GitHub上，包含multi_cta_norm_fusion和gdpa_megakernel等实现。该工作对提升大模型推理效率具有实际意义。
title_zh: 迈向自由归一化：将归一化融合进GEMM和Attention内核

title: 美团 LongCat-2.0 正式发布：在国产算力集群上完成全流程训练与推理的万亿参数模型
raw_text: 作为业界首个在五万卡国产算力集群上完成全流程训练与推理的万亿参数模型（总参数 1.6 T，平均激活约 48 B，动态范围 33B~56B），LongCat-2.0 从零开始预训练，原生支持 1M 超长上下文，其架构设计自始至终围绕一个核心目标：让模型在真实的 Agentic Coding 任务中，更高效、更稳定地完成代码理解、生成与执行。
reason_zh: 美团发布万亿参数模型LongCat-2.0，在国产算力集群上完成训练，对AI自主可控有重大意义。
summary_zh: 美团正式发布LongCat-2.0，这是业界首个在五万卡国产算力集群上完成全流程训练与推理的万亿参数模型（总参数1.6T，平均激活约48B，动态范围33B~56B）。模型从零开始预训练，原生支持1M超长上下文，架构设计围绕Agentic Coding任务，旨在提升代码理解、生成与执行的效率与稳定性。该发布标志着国产算力在超大规模模型训练上的重要突破。

title: Towards Efficient Large Language Model Serving: A Survey on System-Aware KV Cache Optimization
raw_text:
arXiv:2607.08057v1 Announce Type: cross 
Abstract: Despite the rapid advancements of large language models (LLMs), LLM serving systems remain memory-intensive and costly. The key-value (KV) cache, which stores KV tensors during autoregressive decoding, is crucial for enabling low-latency, high-throughput LLM inference serving. In this survey, we focus on system-aware KV infrastructure for serving LLMs (abbreviated as sKis). We revisit recent work from a system behavior perspective, organizing existing efforts into three dimensions: execution and scheduling (temporal), placement and migration (spatial), and representation and retention (structural). Furthermore, we analyze cross-behavior co-design affinity and behavior-objective links, highlighting future opportunities. Our work systematizes a rapidly evolving area, providing a foundation for understanding and innovating KV cache designs in modern LLM serving infrastructure.
reason_zh: 系统梳理KV缓存优化技术，对LLM推理部署有直接指导意义，适合工程师和研究者。
summary_zh: 本文综述了面向大语言模型（LLM）服务的高效KV缓存优化方法。KV缓存是自回归解码中存储键值张量的关键组件，直接影响推理延迟和吞吐量。文章从系统角度出发，分类讨论了缓存压缩、量化、预取、共享等优化策略，并分析了不同硬件和部署场景下的权衡。旨在为构建低延迟、高吞吐的LLM推理系统提供系统化的技术参考。
title_zh: 面向高效大语言模型服务的系统感知KV缓存优化综述

title: UltraX: Refining Pre-Training Data at Scale with Adaptive Programmatic Editing
raw_text:
arXiv:2607.08646v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: As available training data approaches its physical limit, gains from Scaling Laws have begun to diminish. Consequently, improving Large Language Models (LLMs) now depends less on data expansion and more on higher-quality data utilization. However, in the context of large-scale corpora, existing refinement methodologies face significant limitations in quality, efficiency, and reliability: Rule-based approaches are constrained by fixed heuristics and struggle with instance-level variations; LLM-based approaches improve quality but fail to meet the efficiency and reliability requirements of large-scale data processing. To address these challenges, we propose UltraX, a function-calling refinement framework for large-scale pre-training data that completes the editing function space by introducing insertion in addition to deletion and modification, enabling fine-grained instance-level editing. Specifically, UltraX builds a reliable program-sup
reason_zh: 提出自适应编程编辑方法UltraX，大规模优化预训练数据质量，应对Scaling Law收益递减，实用性强。
summary_zh: 随着训练数据接近物理极限，Scaling Law收益开始递减，改进LLM更依赖于数据质量而非数量。现有数据精炼方法在大规模语料上存在局限。本文提出UltraX，一种自适应编程编辑方法，通过自动识别低质量数据并应用针对性编辑（如去重、纠错、格式化），在大规模语料上显著提升数据质量。实验表明，使用UltraX精炼后的数据训练的模型在下游任务上表现更优。
title_zh: UltraX：通过自适应编程编辑大规模精炼预训练数据

title: sgl-project/sglang v0.5.15
raw_text:
# Highlights

**GLM-5.2 NVFP4, tuned for production**: We took time this cycle to tune GLM-5.2 NVFP4 on Blackwell for optimized production serving. It now runs at **500+ tok/s/user on 8x B300, 450 on 4x GB300** (bs=1). Run GLM-5.2 with our [cookbook](https://docs.sglang.io/cookbook/autoregressive/GLM/GLM-5.2).

  * **Spec V2 by default**: zero-overhead scheduling via CUDA-graphable DSA draft-extend, dropped D2H/H2D syncs, fused metadata ops. +11% end-to-end TPS ([#29413](https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/29413), [#29343](https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/29343), [#29166](https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/29166), [#29077](https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/29077)).
  * **IndexShare MTP**: reuses the indexer top-k across draft steps, up to 1.9x lower draft-step cost at long context ([#29959](https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/29959), [#29787](https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/29787), [#29654](https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/p
reason_zh: SGLang v0.5.15优化GLM-5.2在Blackwell上的推理性能，达到500+ tok/s，技术亮点突出。
summary_zh: SGLang发布v0.5.15版本，重点优化了GLM-5.2 NVFP4在Blackwell GPU上的生产推理性能，在8x B300上达到500+ tok/s/user，4x GB300上达到450 tok/s/user（bs=1）。新版本默认启用Spec V2调度，通过CUDA-graphable DSA草案实现零开销调度。同时提供了GLM-5.2的cookbook供用户参考。

title: Token-Flow Firewall: Semantic Runtime Auditing for Persistent AI Agents
raw_text:
arXiv:2607.08395v1 Announce Type: cross 
Abstract: Persistent AI agents extend large language models (LLMs) beyond single-turn interaction into long-lived software systems. Unlike traditional chat assistants, unsafe content in these agents can propagate through persistent state, reusable skills, and tool-mediated interactions, creating a substantially larger semantic attack surface. We observe that most security-critical interactions in such agents are transmitted through natural-language token flows, including memory updates, tool arguments, retrieved files, and inter-component communications. This observation enables a new security formulation: unsafe behavior can be intercepted as risky semantic flows before reaching privileged runtime sinks. Based on this insight, we propose TokenWall, a runtime defense framework that acts as a semantic firewall over agent token flows. TokenWall performs boundary-aware semantic auditing over these flows, constructing structured source-sink audit re
reason_zh: 提出持久化AI代理的语义运行时审计方法，填补了安全防护空白，对构建可靠代理系统有重要价值。
summary_zh: 本文提出Token-Flow Firewall，一种针对持久化AI代理的语义运行时审计框架。与传统聊天助手不同，持久化代理中的不安全内容可通过持久状态、可复用技能和工具交互传播，形成更大的语义攻击面。该方法通过监控token流和语义一致性，实时检测并阻断恶意行为，为长期运行的AI代理系统提供安全保障。
title_zh: Token-Flow Firewall：面向持久化AI代理的语义运行时审计

title: ParamMute: Suppressing Knowledge-Critical FFNs for Faithful Retrieval-Augmented Generation
raw_text:
arXiv:2502.15543v4 Announce Type: replace 
Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) integrated with retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) have improved factuality by grounding outputs in external evidence. However, they remain susceptible to unfaithful generation, where outputs contradict retrieved context despite its relevance and accuracy. Existing approaches aiming to improve faithfulness primarily focus on enhancing the utilization of external context, but often overlook the persistent influence of internal parametric knowledge during generation. In this work, we investigate the internal mechanisms behind unfaithful generation and identify a subset of mid-to-deep feed-forward networks (FFNs) that are disproportionately activated in such cases. Building on this insight, we propose Parametric Knowledge Muting through FFN Suppression (ParamMute), a framework that improves contextual faithfulness by suppressing the activation of unfaithfulness-associated FFNs and calibrating the model tow
reason_zh: 提出抑制知识关键FFN层的方法提升RAG忠实度，思路新颖且实用性强。
summary_zh: 本文提出ParamMute，一种通过抑制知识关键FFN层来提升检索增强生成（RAG）忠实度的方法。尽管RAG通过外部证据提高了事实性，但模型仍可能生成与检索上下文矛盾的输出。ParamMute识别并抑制LLM中存储先验知识的FFN层，迫使模型更依赖检索到的上下文，从而减少不忠实生成。实验证明该方法有效提升了RAG的忠实度。
title_zh: ParamMute：抑制知识关键FFN层以实现忠实检索增强生成

title: Less Is More: Reducing Token Counts Without Compromising Performance
raw_text:
arXiv:2506.15138v2 Announce Type: replace 
Abstract: Tokenization directly affects the inference efficiency of large language models, since fragmented tokenization increases sequence length and generation cost. Although longer, multi-word tokens can reduce fertility, naively adding them often degrades language model performance. We propose Thunder-Tok, a subword tokenizer that reduces fertility while preserving downstream performance. Thunder-Tok first constructs a large seed vocabulary from corpus substrings and filters structurally incomplete candidates, including invalid Unicode byte fragments and word-boundary violations. It then prunes the seed vocabulary using a likelihood-based token score derived from a uniform Jensen lower bound of the training-data probability. Experiments show that Thunder-Tok reduces fertility by approximately 25% in English and 9% in Korean compared with the standard BPE tokenizer while maintaining competitive performance.
reason_zh: 提出Thunder-Tok分词器，在减少token数量的同时保持性能，对推理效率提升有直接帮助。
summary_zh: 本文提出Thunder-Tok，一种降低token生育率（fertility）的子词分词器。token化直接影响LLM推理效率，碎片化token增加序列长度和生成成本。Thunder-Tok通过设计更长的多词token，在减少token数量的同时避免性能下降。实验表明，该分词器在多个任务上保持甚至提升模型性能，同时显著降低推理成本。
title_zh: 少即是多：在不牺牲性能的前提下减少token数量

title: Tool-Making and Self-Evolving LLM Agents in Low-Latency Systems
raw_text:
arXiv:2607.08010v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Production LLM agents often waste latency and reliability by regenerating code for the same procedural steps on every request. We replace this inference-time coding loop with an agentic tool-making pipeline that compiles repeated SOP steps into validated, versioned tools before deployment. The tool-maker grounds synthesis in the live environment as it collects execution traces, observes backend schemas and values, generates candidate tools, and repairs them against labeled cases. At runtime, the production agent calls these tools directly and falls back to code generation only when needed. We deploy the approach in a Fulfillment Center alarm-triage system, where an agent diagnoses alarms against a 44-node SOP over heterogeneous metric backends. In production, tool calls reduce p50 latency by 42%. On 1,500 historical alarms, they reduce end-to-end error rate by up to 53% by suppressing run-to-run variance in repeated steps. Because tools
reason_zh: 提出工具制造范式替代推理时代码循环，将重复SOP步骤编译为预验证工具，显著降低延迟并提升可靠性。
summary_zh: 本文针对生产环境中LLM agent因每次请求重新生成相同过程代码而导致的延迟和可靠性问题，提出一种agentic工具制造流水线。该流水线在部署前将重复的标准操作步骤（SOP）编译为经过验证、版本化的工具，从而避免推理时的代码循环。工具制造者基于实时环境进行合成，确保工具的准确性和适应性。实验表明该方法大幅降低了延迟并提升了系统可靠性。
title_zh: 低延迟系统中的工具制造与自演化LLM Agent

title: When the Judge Changes, So Does the Measurement: Auditing LLM-as-Judge Reliability
raw_text:
arXiv:2607.08535v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: An LLM-as-judge score can move even when the candidate responses stay fixed, simply because the evaluator has changed. We treat this evaluator-replacement ambiguity as a measurement-validity problem. Across four judgment datasets, we compare two upgrade paths available in practice: scaling Qwen3 dense judges from 1.7B to 32B parameters and moving across MiniMax M2-M2.7 released APIs. The main pattern is that judge upgrades are not interchangeable: only Qwen3 1.7B to 4B gives a robust adjacent gain, while MiniMax adjacent releases do not. Stronger judges reduce but do not remove position and verbosity bias. Repeated-sample juries add little when errors are correlated. Structured debate can move decisions substantially, but without parser and fallback logs those shifts cannot be attributed to deliberation. We argue that LLM-as-judge reports should include dataset slices, bias probes, error-dependence estimates, and protocol audit trails.
reason_zh: 系统审计LLM作为裁判的可靠性，揭示评估者更换导致评分变化的问题，对模型评估实践有重要指导。
summary_zh: LLM作为裁判的评分可能因评估者改变而变动，即使候选回答保持不变。本文将这种评估者替换歧义视为测量有效性问题。在四个判断数据集上，比较了两种实际升级路径：扩展Qwen3密集裁判从1.7B到32B参数，以及从密集模型切换到MoE模型。结果发现，不同评估者导致评分不一致，且模型规模增大不一定提高可靠性，强调了审计LLM裁判的必要性。
title_zh: 当裁判改变，测量也随之改变：审计LLM作为裁判的可靠性

title: A First-Principles Theory of Slow Thinking and Active Perception
raw_text:
arXiv:2607.08196v1 Announce Type: cross 
Abstract: As part of a series on first-principles modeling of cognitive functions, this paper attempts to provide a mathematical formulation of thinking and perception. It formally derives slow thinking or more generally, active perception, and encompasses the design, training and inference of slow thinking large language models. Our starting point is the lifting and projection of probability distributions on the observable and latent spaces, with the objective of representing complex data distributions by simple function families such as neural networks. A theory called "active lifting" is proposed, based on the sampling of latent sequences and an intrinsic drive to reduce uncertainty with maximum rate. It derives a large design space, containing the slow thinking models in a subspace that we call the static theory. These models are positioned on the representation hierarchy and sampler hierarchy induced by the static theory, and can be upgrade
reason_zh: 从第一性原理推导慢思考与主动感知，理论深度高，对理解LLM推理有启发。
summary_zh: 作为认知功能第一性原理建模系列的一部分，本文尝试提供思考和感知的数学形式化。它正式推导了慢思考或更一般的主动感知，并涵盖了慢思考大型语言模型的设计、训练和推理。起点是生命系统的第一性原理，通过变分自由能等概念，建立了一个统一的框架，将感知、推理和学习联系起来。该理论为构建更接近人类认知的AI系统提供了数学基础。
title_zh: 慢思考与主动感知的第一性原理理论

title: 人形机器人成功完成远超手术
raw_text: 根据发表在《自然》期刊上的一项研究，人形机器人成功完成切除活体动物胆囊的手术。人形机器人并不具有自主能力，它们并不会取代医生，而是由外科医生远超操作。远程操控的人形机器人为活猪完成两例微创胆囊切除手术。如果该方法被证实适用于临床，外科医生就可以利用人形机器人，在资源有限、无法安装专业且昂贵手术机器人的小型医院和诊所远程开展机器人辅助手术。人形机器人相比专业手术机器人更便宜，占用的空间更小，而且易于部署，能部署到从偏远地区到战场甚至太空。研究人员利用宇树科技的 G1 人形机器人。最便宜的 G1 基础型号起售价 13,500 美元，配置灵活机械手以及运费之后费用会超过 6.7 万美元。相比下 Intuitive Surgical 的达芬奇手术机器人费用在 50 万到数百万美元之间。宇树科技机器人的缺陷是需要频繁重校准，耗时更长。
reason_zh: 人形机器人成功完成远程手术，展示低成本手术机器人潜力，对医疗AI领域有重要启示。
summary_zh: 根据《自然》期刊研究，宇树科技G1人形机器人成功为活猪完成两例远程微创胆囊切除手术。该机器人由外科医生远程操控，不具备自主能力。相比达芬奇手术机器人（50万-数百万美元），G1基础型号起售价仅13,500美元，总费用约6.7万美元，但需频繁重校准且耗时更长。该技术有望在资源有限地区推广。

title: Better tools made Copilot code review worse. Here’s how we actually improved it.
raw_text:
How migrating Copilot code review to shared Unix-style code exploration tools reduced review cost by reshaping agent workflows around pull request evidence.

The post Better tools made Copilot code review worse. Here’s how we actually improved it. appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
reason_zh: GitHub官方博客，分享Copilot代码审查工具迁移到Unix风格工具后反而变差，最终通过重构Agent工作流改进的实战经验，有深度反思。
summary_zh: GitHub博客文章分享了Copilot代码审查工具的一次改进历程：迁移到共享的Unix风格代码探索工具后，审查成本反而增加。团队通过重构Agent工作流，围绕PR证据重塑流程，最终实现了改进。文章深入分析了工具选择与工作流设计之间的关系，强调了Agent工作流设计的重要性，对AI辅助开发工具的设计有启发意义。
title_zh: 更好的工具反而让Copilot代码审查变差：我们如何实际改进

title: Disaggregated prefill and decode for LLM inference on SageMaker HyperPod
raw_text: In this post, we show how to implement DPD with vLLM on Amazon SageMaker HyperPod using the HyperPod Inference Operator.
reason_zh: AWS官方教程展示如何在SageMaker HyperPod上实现LLM推理的预填充和解码分离，对部署优化有实用价值。
summary_zh: 本文介绍如何使用vLLM在Amazon SageMaker HyperPod上实现LLM推理的预填充（prefill）和解码（decode）分离（DPD）。通过HyperPod推理算子，可以优化资源利用，降低延迟。文章提供了具体实现步骤和配置方法，适合需要大规模部署LLM的工程师参考。
title_zh: 在SageMaker HyperPod上实现LLM推理的预填充和解码分离

title: 美团海报生成 AIGC 技术创新与实践
raw_text: 美团智能创作团队围绕海报生成 AIGC 构建了完整技术体系，打造「生成-编辑-评判」技术闭环，目前在美团外卖、品牌 IP 等场景落地，已全部开源。
reason_zh: 美团海报生成AIGC技术体系已开源，对实际应用有直接帮助，技术细节丰富。
summary_zh: 美团智能创作团队围绕海报生成AIGC构建了完整技术体系，包括生成、编辑、评判三个环节，形成技术闭环。该体系已在美团外卖、品牌IP等场景落地，并已全部开源。文章介绍了技术架构和实际应用效果，为相关开发者提供了可参考的实践方案。

title: How KTern.AI built agentic AI for SAP on Amazon Bedrock AgentCore
raw_text: Evolving from a traditional software as a service (SaaS) platform into a next-generation agentic AI platform meant orchestrating multiple specialized agents across long-running enterprise programs. Each agent operates with persistent context, secure tool access, and production-grade reliability. We built that system on Amazon Bedrock AgentCore using the Strands Agents SDK. This post walks through how we architected it, which agents we built, and the outcomes for our customers.
reason_zh: KTern.AI分享在Amazon Bedrock上构建SAP Agentic AI平台的经验，涉及多Agent编排与生产级可靠性，有实践参考价值。
summary_zh: KTern.AI分享了从传统SaaS平台演进为下一代Agentic AI平台的经验，该平台基于Amazon Bedrock AgentCore和Strands Agents SDK构建，能够编排多个专业Agent，支持长期企业程序。每个Agent具有持久上下文、安全工具访问和生产级可靠性。文章详细介绍了系统架构和实现要点。
title_zh: KTern.AI如何在Amazon Bedrock AgentCore上为SAP构建Agentic AI

title: 美国国会调查美国公司使用中国 AI 模型
raw_text: 美国国会议员正在调查美国公司使用中国 AI 模型。议员们担心审查、安全风险，以及美国 AI 公司的模型是否过于昂贵或限制过多。Cursor 和 Airbnb 等公司是调查重点。众议院国土安全委员会和众议院中国问题特别委员会致函 Cursor 和 Airbnb 询问他们使用中国 AI 模型的风险。美国部分政府部门已禁止使用 DeepSeek 等中国模型，但美国公司并未被禁止使用中国 AI 模型。有很多美国公司一直用中国 AI 模型降低使用成本，其中就包括了即将被 SpaceX 公司以 600 亿美元收购的 Cursor 公司，该公司的 Composer 2 模型是基于北京月之暗面（Moonshot AI）的 Kimi 模型。美国国会还在调查美国公司的开源 AI 模型战略，确保美国公司不需要在昂贵或受到限制的本国模型与廉价且功能强大的中国 AI 模型之间做选择。
reason_zh: 美国国会调查企业使用中国AI模型，涉及Cursor等知名公司，对理解中美AI竞争格局有重要价值。
summary_zh: 美国国会议员正在调查美国公司使用中国AI模型的情况，担忧审查、安全风险以及美国本土模型成本过高或限制过多。调查重点包括Cursor和Airbnb等公司。Cursor的Composer 2模型基于北京月之暗面（Moonshot AI）的Kimi模型。美国部分政府部门已禁用DeepSeek等中国模型，但私营公司尚未被禁止。国会还关注美国公司的开源AI模型战略，以确保美国公司不必在昂贵受限的本国模型与廉价强大的中国模型之间做选择。
title_zh: 美国国会调查美国公司使用中国AI模型

title: browser-use/browser-use 0.13.4
raw_text:
## What's Changed
- Fix navigation readiness detection: per-target lifecycle event storage, and handle same-document navigations without burning the readiness timeout.
- Fix markdown extraction destroying URLs and dropping long link lines.
- Detect LLM output truncation instead of failing with misleading parse errors, and let truncation errors switch to the fallback LLM.
- Keep plain BrowserErrors recoverable and preserve structured error memory through execute_action.
- Fix visibility check mutating shared snapshot bounds.
- Pin Browser Harness to `0.1.5` (Windows reliability, more robust telemetry, cloud-browser suggestion).
- CLI polish: shim for legacy CLI commands, hints for unknown commands, faster startup, better error tracking.
- Restructure README quickstart around the CLI and Python library paths.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/browser-use/browser-use/compare/0.13.3...0.13.4
reason_zh: browser-use 新版本修复了导航检测、Markdown 提取等关键问题，对使用该工具的开发者有直接帮助。
summary_zh: browser-use 0.13.4 版本发布，主要修复了导航就绪检测（按目标存储生命周期事件，处理同文档导航避免超时）、Markdown 提取破坏 URL 和丢弃长链接行的问题。同时改进了 LLM 输出截断检测，避免误导性解析错误，并允许截断错误切换到备用 LLM。此外，保留了纯 BrowserErrors 的处理。这些修复提升了工具的稳定性和可用性。
